zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn於1631年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾可洛本時，他的父親Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne28歲，母親Dame Grizel Baillie24歲。他於1666年4月24日與Isabel Sandilands在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安米德 考爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1702年享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn于1631年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾可洛本时，他的父亲Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne28岁，母亲Dame Grizel Baillie24岁。他于1666年4月24日与Isabel Sandilands在苏格兰米德洛迪安米德 考爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1702年享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn was born in 1631, in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne, was 28 and his mother, Dame Grizel Baillie, was 24. He married Isabel Sandilands on 24 April 1666, in Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1702, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn est né en 1631, à Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Dame Grizel Baillie, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Sandilands le 24 avril 1666, à Mid Calder, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1702, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.Ballycastle, County Antrim, Northern Ire: Ballycastle, County Antrim, Nordirland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn 1631 in Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne 28 und seine Mutter Dame Grizel Baillie 24. Er hat am 24. April 1666 in Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland Isabel Sandilands geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1702 im Alter von 71 Jahren.

Lui sposato Isabel Sandilands il 24 aprile 1666, nel Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1702, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburnが1631年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアクロセブルンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburneは28歳，母Dame Grizel Baillieは24歳であった。1666年4月24日にスコットランドミドロスアンミド カルダーでIsabel Sandilandsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1702年に71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn(이)가 1631년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 클로세번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Dame Grizel Baillie(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1666년 4월 24일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 미드 캘더에서 Isabel Sandilands(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1702년 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn nasceu em 1631, em Closeburn, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dame Grizel Baillie, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Sandilands em 24 de abril de 1666, em Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1702, com 71 anos.

ru.Ballycastle, County Antrim, Northern Ire: балликастл, коунти антрим, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Kirkpatrick 1st Baronet of Closeburn родился в 1631 г. в местности клосебурн, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Kirkpatrick 17th Laird of Closeburne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dame Grizel Baillie, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Sandilands 24 апреля 1666 г. в местности мид калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1702 г. в возрасте 71 год.

Se casó con Isabel Sandilands el 24 de abril de 1666, en Mid Calder, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1702, a la edad de 71 años.
